content_body:
Gary and Lissa - Thank you for such a wonderful cabin. This was a great place to come with old friends and enjoy a few days together. The best time of all was spent on the pontoon for a day on Lake Blue Ridge. It was beautiful here and we enjoyed perfect weather. The cabin was well thought out by the two of you and beautifully furnished throughout. Red Fox showed up at the end of porch downstairs – later we saw a raccoon. Great wildlife here! Tubing was a great experience too – as long as you don’t fall off! I think we had it all and did it all! Thanks so much for everything!
AL and MS
title: Summer Vacation with Cabin Rentals of Georgia
